subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto God Who hath sealed the line of Messengers with the Seal [Muhammad], and the Books with the Qur'an, whereby He hath distinguished truth from falsehood [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی ختم الرسل بالخاتم و الکتب بالفرقان و به فرق بین الحق و الباطل
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @consolation and comfort, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @unity; oneness of humanity, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
